title: Tangy Indian Kidney Beans Rajma
description: A flavorful and nostalgic Andhra dish featuring kidney beans in a tangy cider vinegar sauce, air-fried to perfection and served in a copper mug, this recipe is a delicious blend of umami and crunchy textures, with an ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly twist.
instructions: Heat peanut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add chopped onion, ginger, and garlic, and saute until the onion is translucent.
Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt, and stir well.
Add cooked kidney beans, cider vinegar, and 1/4 cup of water, and stir well.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for 10 minutes.
Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Transfer the kidney bean mixture to a copper mug and air-fry for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
